import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    return Err("no input")
  end
  let score = match string.parse_int(string.trim(line))
  when Some(n)
    n
  when None
    return Err("invalid input")
  end
  if score >= 90
    println("A")
  else if score >= 75
    println("B")
  else if score >= 60
    println("C")
  else
    println("F")
  end
  Ok(())
end
